description_long: This object is a rectangular flag featuring a classic black-and-white checkered pattern, commonly associated with racing events. The flag is attached to a slender, cylindrical pole that appears to be made of a lightweight material, likely metal or plastic. The checkered pattern consists of alternating black and white squares arranged in a grid, covering the entire flag surface. The flag is flat and taut, with no visible folds or waving, suggesting it is either new or rendered in a static position. The pole is plain and unadorned, extending slightly above and below the flag itself. The overall appearance is clean and well-maintained, with sharp color contrast and no visible damage.
description: A black-and-white checkered flag mounted on a slim, plain pole, with a crisp and clean appearance.
description_view_0: The flag is fully visible with its checkered pattern and the pole on the left side.
description_view_1: The flag is edge-on, showing only the thin profile of the pole and no visible flag surface.
description_view_2: The checkered flag is visible with the pole on the right side, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: The flag is again edge-on, showing only the slim pole with no flag surface visible.
attribute_flag_design: A rectangular flag with a black-and-white checkered pattern, consisting of evenly sized alternating squares in a grid layout, with no text, symbols, or emblems.
